description: Oracle Analytics Desktop is open. Using the dataset 'sample_order_lines.xlsx' located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines.xlsx, create a new workbook. Define a calculated column named 'Order Size Tier' based on 'Revenue' using the following logic: 'Small' for values under 100, 'Medium' for 100 to under 500, 'Large' for 500 to under 1000, and 'Enterprise' for 1000 and above. Create a Donut Chart visualization using 'Order Size Tier' as the category and a count-based measure for the size. Save the workbook as 'Order_Size_Analysis'.
